requirement_topic.en: EMC Evidence — IEC 61000 Series and IEC 62920 for Mauritius PV Inverter Submissions
requirement_topic.zh: EMC证据——毛里求斯光伏逆变器提交中的IEC 61000系列和IEC 62920
requirement_topic.zht: EMC證據——模里西斯光伏逆變器提交中的IEC 61000系列和IEC 62920

summary.en: Mauritius Standards Bureau (MSB) is the national standards body, and Mauritius practice is IEC/BS-influenced because of its British colonial standards legacy. For PV inverters, EMC evidence should be prepared on an IEC-aligned basis, especially IEC 62920 for photovoltaic power conversion equipment and applicable IEC 61000-series emission and immunity tests. CEB project reviewers and procurement specifications may require these EMC reports as part of the inverter technical package for SSDG/MSDG or larger distributed-generation projects.
summary.zh: 毛里求斯标准局（MSB）是国家标准机构，毛里求斯实践因英国殖民标准遗留而受IEC/BS影响。对于光伏逆变器，EMC证据应按IEC对齐基础准备，尤其是适用于光伏功率变换设备的IEC 62920及适用的IEC 61000系列发射和抗扰度测试。CEB项目审查方和采购规格可能要求将这些EMC报告作为SSDG/MSDG或更大型分布式发电项目逆变器技术包的一部分。
summary.zht: 模里西斯標準局（MSB）是國家標準機構，模里西斯實務因英國殖民標準遺留而受IEC/BS影響。對於光伏逆變器，EMC證據應按IEC對齊基礎準備，尤其是適用於光伏功率轉換設備的IEC 62920及適用的IEC 61000系列發射和抗擾度測試。CEB項目審查方和採購規格可能要求將這些EMC報告作為SSDG/MSDG或更大型分散式發電項目逆變器技術包的一部分。

standards_or_laws: Mauritius Standards Bureau (MSB) standards and conformity-assessment framework
IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emission and immunity standards
CEB technical review for distributed-generation connection submissions

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly built around GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories. These reports may show useful design maturity, but they are not automatically treated as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000 compliance evidence for Mauritius submissions unless the report scope, editions, limits, test configuration, and laboratory accreditation are acceptable to the Mauritius project reviewer or conformity body.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常围绕GB/T 37408-2021及CNAS认可实验室出具的相关国内测试报告建立。这些报告可显示有用的设计成熟度，但除非报告范围、版本、限值、测试配置和实验室认可被毛里求斯项目审查方或合格评定机构接受，否则不会自动被视为IEC 62920或IEC 61000合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常圍繞GB/T 37408-2021及CNAS認可實驗室出具的相關國內測試報告建立。這些報告可顯示有用的設計成熟度，但除非報告範圍、版本、限值、測試配置和實驗室認可被模里西斯項目審查方或合格評定機構接受，否則不會自動被視為IEC 62920或IEC 61000合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: GB/T 37408-2021 EMC files should be mapped clause-by-clause against IEC 62920 and the applicable IEC 61000-series tests. Exporters should provide IEC test reports for the exact inverter model, power rating, firmware configuration, accessories, and enclosure options supplied to Mauritius. Where testing was performed only under China domestic conditions, confirm whether Mauritius 230/400 V 50 Hz operation, tropical humidity, coastal salt-mist exposure, and installation layout require supplemental EMC or environmental validation.
gap.zh: 差距：GB/T 37408-2021 EMC文件应逐条映射至IEC 62920和适用的IEC 61000系列测试。出口商应为供应至毛里求斯的具体逆变器型号、功率等级、固件配置、附件和外壳选项提供IEC测试报告。若测试仅在中国国内条件下完成，应确认毛里求斯230/400 V 50 Hz运行、热带湿度、沿海盐雾暴露和安装布局是否需要补充EMC或环境验证。
gap.zht: 差距：GB/T 37408-2021 EMC文件應逐條映射至IEC 62920和適用的IEC 61000系列測試。出口商應為供應至模里西斯的具體逆變器型號、功率等級、韌體配置、附件和外殼選項提供IEC測試報告。若測試僅在中國國內條件下完成，應確認模里西斯230/400 V 50 Hz運行、熱帶濕度、沿海鹽霧暴露和安裝布局是否需要補充EMC或環境驗證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where MSB conformity, CEB technical review, procurement specifications, or project-owner requirements call for IEC-aligned EMC evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese EMC evidence may support domestic certification or voluntary conformity but is not automatically accepted as Mauritius IEC-aligned EMC evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series EMC evidence for Mauritius instead of relying only on GB/T 37408-2021 reports. Confirm with MSB, CEB, the EPC contractor, or project owner whether Chinese CNAS reports are acceptable as supporting evidence or whether ILAC-accredited IEC reports are required for the exact inverter configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应为毛里求斯准备IEC 62920和适用IEC 61000系列EMC证据，而不是仅依赖GB/T 37408-2021报告。请与MSB、CEB、EPC承包商或项目业主确认中国CNAS报告是否可作为支持证据接受，或是否必须为具体逆变器配置提供ILAC认可的IEC报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應為模里西斯準備IEC 62920和適用IEC 61000系列EMC證據，而不是僅依賴GB/T 37408-2021報告。請與MSB、CEB、EPC承包商或項目業主確認中國CNAS報告是否可作為支持證據接受，或是否必須為具體逆變器配置提供ILAC認可的IEC報告。
